Setlist
Lie in Our Graves Reprises Played Separately
This is a complete list of all the times the last section of Lie in Our Graves, commonly called the reprise, has been played separately from the main song. In most cases this was during the same show, but occasionally the band completed the song one or two days later while still at the same venue.
Song Date Reprise Date Location # of Songs Between Notes 
08.22.0708.22.07Riverbend Music Center, Cincinnati, OH10reprise played in the encore
08.31.0709.02.07The Gorge Amphitheatre, George, WA45song played on night 1, reprise played in the encore of night 3
09.12.0709.12.07Ford Amphitheater at the Florida State Fairgrounds, Tampa, FL1
09.15.0709.15.07Sound Advice Amphitheatre, West Palm Beach, FL3
09.22.0709.22.07Smirnoff Music Centre, Dallas, TX3
06.21.0806.21.08Saratoga Performing Arts Center, Saratoga Springs, NY3reprise played in the encore
09.04.1109.04.11The Gorge Amphitheatre, George, WA6reprise played in the encore
09.16.1109.18.11Harlem River Event Area (Randall's Island Park), New York, NY40song played on night 1, reprise played in the encore of night 3
07.10.1207.10.12DTE Energy Music Theatre, Clarkston, MI6reprise played in the encore
08.31.1209.02.12The Gorge Amphitheatre, George, WA38song played on night 1, reprise played on night 3
06.28.1306.29.13Susquehanna Bank Center, Camden, NJ28song played on night 1, reprise played on night 2
08.01.1508.01.15Perfect Vodka Amphitheatre at the South Florida Fairgrounds, West Palm Beach, FL15song played in the acoustic set, reprise played in the encore
07.27.1607.27.16MIDFLORIDA Credit Union Amphitheatre at the Florida State Fairgrounds, Tampa, FL14song played as opener
05.03.1705.03.17Tuscaloosa Amphitheater, Tuscaloosa, AL10Dave and Tim show; reprise played in the second encore
05.31.1705.31.17Verizon Wireless Amphitheatre at Encore Park, Alpharetta, GA14Dave and Tim show; reprise played in the second encore
04.03.1904.03.19Mediolanum Forum, Assago, MI, ITA1reprise played in the encore
04.04.2404.04.24Palladium KÃ¶ln, Cologne, DEU6reprise played in the encore
09.01.2409.01.24The Gorge Amphitheatre, George, WA1
07.22.2507.23.25BankNH Pavilion, Gilford, NH37song played as opener of night 1, reprise played in the encore of night 2
08.29.2508.31.25The Gorge Amphitheatre, George, WA45song played on night 1, reprise played on night 3
